tasks.title: Analyze chat popup entry point in apps/extension/popup.html and /src/popup/main.tsx
tasks.description: Inspect apps/extension/popup.html and the referenced /src/popup/main.tsx entry script to understand how the chat popup is initialized and rendered. Identify any missing or misconfigured elements that could prevent the popup from opening.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear understanding of popup initialization flow
Identification of any missing or misconfigured elements in popup.html or main.tsx
tasks.expectedResult: Documented root cause hypotheses related to popup initialization and rendering

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding of popup initialization for debugging

tasks.title: Investigate chat popup React component and state management in src/popup/main.tsx and related files
tasks.description: Examine the React components and state management logic in src/popup/main.tsx and any imported modules to identify issues that could prevent the chat popup from rendering or opening correctly. Check for errors, missing state updates, or event handlers.
acceptanceCriteria: Identified any React component errors or missing state logic
tasks.expectedResult: Clear list of React component or state issues affecting popup open behavior

evidence: Reviewed React component code and state management
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Identifies React-level issues blocking popup open

tasks.title: Check extension manifest and permissions related to popup in apps/extension/manifest.json
tasks.description: Review the extension manifest file apps/extension/manifest.json to verify that the popup is correctly declared and that necessary permissions are granted. Identify any misconfigurations that could prevent the popup from opening.
acceptanceCriteria: Required permissions for popup operation are present
tasks.expectedResult: Confirmed manifest correctness or identified manifest issues blocking popup

evidence: Reviewed manifest.json for popup and permissions
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures extension manifest supports popup functionality

tasks.title: Inspect console logs and runtime errors when opening chat popup in development environment
tasks.description: Run the extension in development mode, open the chat popup, and capture console logs and runtime errors. Identify any exceptions or errors that occur during popup open attempt.
acceptanceCriteria: Console logs captured during popup open
Errors or warnings identified and documented

commands: echo 'Check browser console logs for errors'

tasks.expectedResult: Collected runtime error logs and warnings related to popup open

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides runtime error context for debugging popup open failure

tasks.title: Review chat popup state and visibility control logic in src/popup/components/ChatPopup.tsx or equivalent
tasks.description: Locate the React component responsible for the chat popup UI (e.g., ChatPopup.tsx) and review the logic controlling its visibility and open state. Identify any bugs or missing state updates that prevent the popup from opening.
acceptanceCriteria: Identified state or props issues affecting popup visibility
Documented required fixes to state management
tasks.expectedResult: Clear diagnosis of popup visibility control issues

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Identifies state management fixes to enable popup open

tasks.title: Fix chat popup open state management and event handlers in src/popup/main.tsx and ChatPopup.tsx
tasks.description: Apply targeted code changes to fix the chat popup open state management and event handlers based on previous analysis. Ensure the popup visibility toggles correctly on user interaction and that no blocking errors remain.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup opens and closes correctly on user interaction
No runtime errors related to popup state
Code changes follow project style and conventions
tasks.expectedResult: Chat popup opens and closes correctly with no errors

outputPlan.description: Fix popup open state management and event handlers

metadata.inputContext: Analysis of popup state and event handling issues

tasks.title: Verify chat popup open functionality with integration test in src/popup/__tests__/ChatPopup.test.tsx
tasks.description: Create or update an integration test in src/popup/__tests__/ChatPopup.test.tsx to verify that the chat popup opens and renders correctly when triggered. Test user interaction and visibility toggling.
acceptanceCriteria: Test covers popup open and close user interactions
tasks.expectedResult: Reliable automated test verifying popup open functionality

outputPlan.description: Add or update integration test for chat popup open behavior

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures popup open functionality is tested and verified

tasks.title: Run full test suite to validate no regressions after chat popup fix
tasks.description: Execute the full project test suite to ensure that the chat popup fix did not introduce regressions or break other functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: No new errors or warnings introduced
tasks.expectedResult: Full test suite passes with no regressions

metadata.inputContext: Codebase with chat popup fixes and tests
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms overall project stability after popup fix
